mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('forest_reaction_seq')
INSERT INTO forest_reaction (id, forest_knot_id, user_id, action_text, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{forestKnotId}, #{userId}, #{actionText}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, forest_knot_id, user_id, action_text, created_at, updated_at FROM forest_reaction WHERE forest_knot_id = #{forestKnotId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE forest_reaction SET action_text = #{actionText}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
